rewrite_purpose: Guide reviewers to remove implied health or nutrition benefit wording from non-compliant ad copy.
summary: Remove implied health or nutrition benefit wording when product category or substantiation does not support the claim.
rewrite_guidance: TRIGGER: Healthier, lower sugar, or general health benefit language on misclassified products. ACTION: Remove health-implication phrases from copy and imagery. CHECK: Product category, on-pack claims, and ingredient context. ESCALATE IF: Disease or cure language remains — route to Rule Corpus.
review_guidance: ESCALATE IF: Removing the claim leaves misleading product positioning or conflicts with on-pack label.

measurable_criteria.scoring_notes: must_remove_terms checked on original ad text; concepts on playbook rewrite guidance (benchmark v3).
